attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
NSLC.BK_STRTGC_LOGISTICS_CNTR_NAME AS BK_STRTGC_LOGISTICS_CNTR_NAME,
trim(NSC.BK_CARTON_ID) AS BK_CARTON_ID,
SSSED.RESPONSE_DATE AS BK_RESPONSE_DTM,
CYCLE_COUNT_ID as SK_CYCLE_COUNT_ID,
'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
(CASE WHEN NSSCI.BK_STRTGC_LOGISTICS_CNTR_NAME IS NOT NULL AND NSSCI.BK_CARTON_ID  IS NOT NULL  AND  NSSCI.BK_RESPONSE_DTM IS NOT NULL 
THEN 'U' ELSE 'I' END) AS DML_TYPE
FROM
(SELECT 
HANDLING_UNIT_ID,
RESPONSE_DATE,
SLC_SITE_NAME,
CYCLE_COUNT_ID
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_CG1_XXSCM_DV_4C1_IB_IFACE
UNION 
SELECT 
HANDLING_UNIT_ID,
RESPONSE_DATE,
SLC_SITE_NAME,
CYCLE_COUNT_ID
FROM
$$EXCEPDB.EX_CG1_XXSCM_DV_4C1_IB_IFACE
)SSSED
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SHIPMENT_CARTON NSC
ON trim(SSSED.HANDLING_UNIT_ID)=trim(NSC.BK_CARTON_ID) 
INNER  JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_STRATEGIC_LOGISTICS_CENTER NSLC
ON SSSED.SLC_SITE_NAME=NSLC.BK_STRTGC_LOGISTICS_CNTR_NAME
LEFT JOIN $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_SLC_SITE_CNTNR_INV_INBOUND NSSCI
ON SSSED.SLC_SITE_NAME= NSSCI.BK_STRTGC_LOGISTICS_CNTR_NAME
AND trim(SSSED.HANDLING_UNIT_ID)= trim(NSSCI.BK_CARTON_ID)
AND  SSSED.RESPONSE_DATE= NSSCI.BK_RESPONSE_DTM

SELECT SCXDII.MESSAGE_ID, SCXDII.CYCLE_COUNT_ID, SCXDII.RESPONSE_DATE, SCXDII.HANDLING_UNIT_ID, SCXDII.HANDLING_UNIT_ID_STATUS, SCXDII.CREATED_BY, 
SCXDII.CREATION_DATE, SCXDII.LAST_UPDATED_BY, SCXDII.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, SCXDII.ATTRIBUTE1, SCXDII.ATTRIBUTE2, SCXDII.ATTRIBUTE3, SCXDII.ATTRIBUTE4, 
SCXDII.ATTRIBUTE5, SCXDII.ATTRIBUTE6, SCXDII.ATTRIBUTE7, SCXDII.ATTRIBUTE8, SCXDII.ATTRIBUTE9, SCXDII.ATTRIBUTE10, SCXDII.ATTRIBUTE11, SCXDII.ATTRIBUTE12, 
SCXDII.ATTRIBUTE13, SCXDII.ATTRIBUTE14, SCXDII.ATTRIBUTE15, SCXDII.SLC_SITE_NAME, SCXDII.PART_DUNS_NUMBER, SCXDII.CISCO_DUNS_NUMBER, SCXDII.B2B_PROCESS_STATUS, 
SCXDII.SEQ_ID,  SCXDII.GLOBAL_NAME,SCXDII.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME,REFRESH_DATETIME, 'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM
$$STGDB. ST_CG1_XXSCM_DV_4C1_IB_IFACE SCXDII
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SHIPMENT_CARTON NSC 
WHERE trim(SCXDII.HANDLING_UNIT_ID)= trim(NSC.BK_CARTON_ID)) 
OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_STRATEGIC_LOGISTICS_CENTER NSLC
WHERE NSLC.BK_STRTGC_LOGISTICS_CNTR_NAME = SCXDII.SLC_SITE_NAME)
